message:
Expand browser I/O capability model with storage, streaming, and fetch hardening

Add default-deny posture to FetchAuthority, introduce a full browser
storage capability model with authority/quota/consistency/redaction
policies, and add browser streaming adapter scaffolds.

src/io/cap.rs:
- Add IoCapabilities::BROWSER const (network+timer, no file ops)
- Refactor FetchAuthority to default-deny: empty allowed_origins,
  empty allowed_methods, credentials denied, 0 max headers
- Add FetchAuthority builder: deny_all(), grant_origin(),
  grant_method(), with_max_header_count(), with_credentials_allowed()
- Add StorageBackend enum (IndexedDb, LocalStorage)
- Add StorageOperation enum (Get, Set, Delete, ListKeys,
  ClearNamespace)
- Add StorageRequest struct with builder and convenience constructors
  (get, set, delete, list_keys, clear_namespace)
- Add StoragePolicyError enum with 9 typed denial variants
  (InvalidNamespace, BackendDenied, NamespaceDenied, OperationDenied,
  MissingKey, KeyTooLarge, ValueTooLarge, NamespaceTooLarge,
  EntryCountExceeded, QuotaExceeded)
- Add StorageAuthority with deny-all default and builder pattern
  (grant_backend, grant_namespace with prefix/wildcard selectors,
  grant_operation)
- Add StorageQuotaPolicy (5MB total, 256B keys, 1MB values, 128B
  namespaces, 10K entries)
- Add StorageConsistencyPolicy enum (ImmediateReadAfterWrite,
  ReadAfterWriteEventualList)
- Add StorageRedactionPolicy (keys redacted by default)
- Add StorageIoCap trait (authorize, quota_policy, consistency_policy,
  redaction_policy)
- Add BrowserStorageIoCap struct implementing StorageIoCap with full
  authority+quota validation pipeline

src/io/browser_storage.rs (new, 490 lines):
- Browser storage adapter contract tests and scaffolding for
  IndexedDB/localStorage capability integration

src/io/browser_stream.rs (new, 1281 lines):
- Browser streaming I/O adapter with ReadableStream/WritableStream
  capability contracts, backpressure policy, and cancellation
  integration scaffolding

src/io/mod.rs:
- Add browser_storage and browser_stream modules
- Re-export new storage and streaming types

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
